summary: Weekly PO Generation feature testing completed. All 19 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - Generate POs toolbar with 'Select Next 4 Weeks' and 'Select All Weeks' buttons working, week checkboxes with blue ring highlight on selection, Clear button shows count, Download Template/Upload POs/Preview POs buttons appear when weeks selected. Preview dialog shows vendors count (12), items count (136), total amount (₹54L), items needing vendor (204). Warning banner appears for items without vendor. Weekly Draft POs section shows generated POs with edit/approve/issue actions. Edit dialog allows changing vendor and viewing line items.

issues: Some vendor names are empty (showing blank) - vendor_name field not populated for some vendors in vendor_rm_prices collection

critical_code_review_comments: Weekly PO state variables correctly initialized at lines 137-145 (selectedWeeksForPO, showPOPreviewDialog, poPreviewData, etc.)
downloadPOTemplate function (lines 227-254) correctly downloads Excel file with proper filename
uploadPOFile function (lines 257-292) correctly uploads file and creates Draft POs
PO Generation Toolbar (lines 1895-1984) correctly shows Select Next 4 Weeks, Select All Weeks, Clear, Download Template, Upload POs, Preview POs buttons
Week checkboxes (lines 2088-2093) correctly toggle selection with blue ring highlight (ring-2 ring-blue-500)
Preview Dialog (lines 2585-2675) correctly shows summary stats, warning banner, vendor PO list, Download Template and Upload & Generate buttons
Edit Dialog (lines 2677-2791) correctly shows vendor dropdown, line items table with editable quantities, Approve and Issue PO buttons
Backend preview endpoint (lines 1768-1867) correctly groups items by vendor and identifies items without vendor
Backend download-template endpoint (lines 1870-2006) correctly creates Excel with PO_Lines, Vendors_Reference, Instructions sheets
Backend upload endpoint (lines 2009-2157) correctly parses Excel and creates Draft POs grouped by vendor
seed_data_creation: Used existing weekly MRP run MRP-20260328-165645 with 52 weeks, 1302 Common RMs. Created 1 Weekly Draft PO (WPO-20260328-0079) via upload test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Weekly PO Generation feature fully tested. Key verifications: 1) Generate POs toolbar appears with 'Select Next 4 Weeks' and 'Select All Weeks' buttons. 2) Checkboxes appear next to each week accordion for selection. 3) Selected weeks get blue ring highlight (ring-2 ring-blue-500). 4) Clear button shows count and clears selection. 5) Download Template, Upload POs, Preview POs buttons appear when weeks selected. 6) Preview POs dialog shows: 12 vendors, 136 items, ₹54,21,369 total, 204 items needing vendor. 7) Warning banner appears when items need vendor assignment. 8) Vendor PO list shows item count, weeks covered, amount, quantity per vendor. 9) Download Template downloads Excel file with PO_Lines, Vendors_Reference, Instructions sheets. 10) Upload & Generate creates Draft POs grouped by vendor. 11) Weekly Draft POs section shows generated POs with edit/approve/issue actions. 12) Edit dialog allows changing vendor and line quantities.
